name: Draft wrongful-termination grievance statement
notes: Lay out the just-cause argument and the procedural defects in how the company handled Reyes's discharge.

name: Gather 20-year service record and evaluations
notes: Pull the grievant's full personnel file and performance reviews to show a clean disciplinary history before the discharge.

name: Interview witnesses from second shift
notes: Take signed statements from second-shift coworkers who can corroborate the grievant's account of the disputed absence.

name: File Step-2 grievance with labor relations
notes: Submit the written Step-2 grievance to the labor relations office before the contractual deadline lapses.

name: Request investigatory file via information request
notes: Send a formal information request for the company's investigation notes, write-ups, and time records on the discharge.

name: Schedule Step-3 hearing with plant labor relations
notes: Coordinate dates with plant labor relations for the Step-3 hearing and confirm the grievant and steward can attend.

name: Prepare arbitration exhibit binder
notes: Compile and Bates-number every exhibit for the Reyes arbitration and prepare copies for the arbitrator and company.

name: Brief Carla Simmons on case strategy
notes: Walk the co-steward through the theory of the case and assign her the witness-prep and exhibit follow-ups.

name: Confirm arbitrator availability dates
notes: Reach out to the panel arbitrator's office to lock in hearing dates that work for both parties.

name: Draft closing-argument outline
notes: Outline the closing argument tying the evidence to the just-cause standard and the remedy of reinstatement with back pay.

name: Coordinate member testimony prep
notes: Schedule witness-prep sessions and run mock cross-examination with the members who will testify at the hearing.

name: Review past attendance-policy arbitrations
notes: Read prior awards interpreting the no-fault attendance policy to find precedent favorable to the grievant.

name: Write post-hearing summary for the local
notes: Summarize how the hearing went and the likely next steps for the executive board and the affected members.

name: Update member on case status
notes: Call the grievant with a status update on the Step-3 outcome and what to expect at arbitration.

name: Calculate make-whole overtime hours owed
notes: Total the missed overtime hours from the distribution log to quantify the remedy in the equalization grievance.

name: Audit attendance points against FMLA leave dates
notes: Cross-check the company's points ledger against approved FMLA dates to identify charges that must be reversed.

name: Compare recall list against new hires
notes: Match the layoff recall roster to recent hire dates to prove senior members were skipped in favor of new employees.

name: Train new stewards on Weingarten rights
notes: Run a session for the new steward cohort on invoking Weingarten representation during investigatory interviews.

name: Document excused absences for points appeal
notes: Collect doctor's notes and approved-leave forms for each absence the company wrongly charged as a point.

name: Collect pay stubs showing premium deductions
notes: Gather member pay stubs documenting the mid-contract healthcare premium increase deducted in violation of the benefit schedule.
